info.name: DevFix AI API
info.description:
Complete API collection for DevFix AI — Software Installation Intelligence Platform

Base URL: http://localhost:8082

Modules:
- Technologies: Software/tool knowledge base
- Errors: Developer error knowledge base with search

request.description:
Returns all technology records.

Expected: 200 OK + JSON array

Returns one technology by its ID.

Expected: 200 OK + technology object with errors[] list

Tests 404 exception handler.

Expected: 404 + {status, message, timestamp}

Tests type mismatch exception handler.

Expected: 400 + {status, message, timestamp}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Docker",
  "description": "Container platform",
  "category": "DevOps",
  "latestVersion": "26",
  "downloadUrl": "https://www.docker.com/",
  "officialWebsite": "https://www.docker.com",
  "commonErrors": "Docker daemon not running",
  "installationSteps": "Download Docker Desktop → Install → Start Docker service"
}

request.description:
Creates a new technology record.

Expected: 201 Created + created object

Tests @NotBlank validation on name field.

Expected: 400 + {name: 'Name is required'}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Java",
  "latestVersion": "21",
  "category": "Programming Language",
  "downloadUrl": "https://www.oracle.com/java/",
  "officialWebsite": "https://www.oracle.com",
  "commonErrors": "JAVA_HOME not set, OutOfMemoryError",
  "installationSteps": "Download JDK → Install → Set JAVA_HOME → Verify with java -version"
}

request.description:
Partial update — only provided fields are changed.

Expected: 200 OK + updated object

Deletes by ID. Using 9999 so existing data is safe.

Expected: 404 (ID doesn't exist)

Returns all TechError records with embedded Technology.

Expected: 200 OK + array of 10 errors

Returns one TechError with its full solution.

Expected: 200 OK + error object

Tests 404 exception handler for TechError.

Expected: 404 + {status, message, timestamp}

Core DevFix AI search feature.
Searches across: errorCode, errorMessage, cause, solution, tags

Expected: 200 + matching errors

Search for port-related errors.

Expected: 200 + PORT_8080_IN_USE error

Search for memory-related errors.

Expected: 200 + OUT_OF_MEMORY error

Returns all errors for Java (technology ID=1).

Expected: 200 + 6 Java errors

Returns all errors for Maven (technology ID=2).

Expected: 200 + 4 Maven errors

Returns only CRITICAL severity errors.

Expected: 200 + OUT_OF_MEMORY + DB_CONNECTION_REFUSED

Returns only HIGH severity errors.

Expected: 200 + multiple errors

body.raw:
{
  "technology": { "id": 1 },
  "errorCode": "SPRING_BEAN_NOT_FOUND",
  "errorMessage": "No qualifying bean of type 'com.devfix.service.MyService' available",
  "category": "Config",
  "severity": "HIGH",
  "osAffected": "All",
  "cause": "Spring cannot find or create the required bean. Usually caused by missing @Service/@Component annotation or incorrect package scan.",
  "solution": "1. Add @Service to the class\n2. Ensure the class is in a sub-package of the main application class\n3. Check @ComponentScan if using custom package structure\n4. Verify there are no circular dependency issues",
  "tags": "spring,bean,dependency-injection,annotation,component"
}

request.description:
Adds a new error to the knowledge base.

Expected: 201 Created + full error object

Tests validation — missing required fields: errorCode, errorMessage, cause, solution.

Expected: 400 + map of field errors

Partial update — no @Valid so only provided fields change.

Expected: 200 OK + updated error

Deletes an error by ID. Using 9999 so existing data is safe.

Expected: 404 (ID doesn't exist)
